The question is asking to determine which city has the stadium with the largest capacity. To find out, we need to sort the data based on the "capacity" column in the order of "large to small" using the f_sort_column(capacity) operation. This will allow us to see the stadium with the largest capacity first, along with its corresponding city.
The stadium with the largest capacity is the Stade de France at 81,338 seats, located in Paris. Therefore, Paris is the city with the stadium that has the largest capacity.
